name: telegram_activity_broadcast
description: Broadcasts new activities to the church Telegram channel in both Swedish and Amharic.

steps.notes: Receives POST from admin-web /content-editor/publish with the new activity data.

Formats bilingual message: emoji + sv title + am title + date/time + sv description + am description. Example: '📢 Söndagsgudstjänst / የእሁድ ቅዳሴ
🗓 8 juni kl 11:00
📍 Storgatan 1

Gudstjänst med nattvard.
ቅዳሴ ለቁርባን ገር።'
POST to Telegram Bot API sendMessage with chat_id=@kyrka_kanal. parse_mode=HTML for formatting.
Optional: send email via Mailgun to members without Telegram. Only if email list is configured.
